{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2014
|other_titles    = Copa Sadia do Brasil 2014
|image           = Copa Sadia 2014.png
|imagesize       = 140px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = 19 February – 26 November
|num_teams       = 87
|champions       = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]<br/>{{small|(1st title)}}
|runner-up       = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]
|matches         = 159
|goals           = 432
|top goal scorer = {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Bill (footballer, born 1984)|Bill]]<br/>{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gabriel Barbosa|Gabriel]]<br/>{{small|(6 goals each)}}
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2013 Copa do Brasil|2013]]
|nextseason      = [[2015 Copa do Brasil|2015]]
}}
The '''2014 Copa do Brasil''' (officially the '''2014 Copa [[Sadia]] do Brasil''' for sponsorship reasons)<ref>{{cite web|url=http://exame.abril.com.br/marketing/noticias/sadia-assina-naming-rights-da-copa-do-brasil|title=Sadia assina naming rights da Copa do Brasil|work=exame.abril.com.br/|language=pt}}</ref> was the 26th edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]] football competition.  The competition was contested by 87 teams, either qualified through participating their respective state championships (71), by the [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF Rankings]] (10) or those qualified for [[2014 Copa Libertadores]] (6). Clubs that qualified for the [[2014 Copa Libertadores]] entered the competition in the 4th stage. The seven best teams of the [[2013 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2013 Brazilian Championship]] eliminated until the [[2014 Copa do Brasil#Third Round|third round]] qualified for the [[2014 Copa Sudamericana]].

==Format==
The competition was a [[single elimination]] [[knockout tournament]] featuring [[two-legged tie]]s. In the first two rounds, if the away team won the first match by 2 or more goals, it progressed straight to the next round avoiding the second leg. The [[away goals rule]] was also used in the 2014 Copa do Brasil. The Copa winner qualifies for the [[2015 Copa Libertadores]].

==Qualified Teams==
The teams (in bold) qualified for [[2014 Copa Libertadores]] qualified directly for the Fourth Stage (round of 16) of the Copa do Brasil.

!width=210|Team <small>(Berth)</small>

|-
|[[Lagarto Futebol Clube|Lagarto]]{{Ref|1|[A]}} || 2013 [[Copa Governo do Estado de Sergipe]] 3rd place<ref>[http://itabi.infonet.com.br/fsf/images/documentos/regulamento_a1_2013.pdf 2013 Campeonato Sergipano regulations ] Art 7 §1 page 6</ref>
|-
| {{flagicon|Tocantins}} [[Federação Tocantinense de Futebol|Tocantins]]<br /><small>1 berth</small> || [[Interporto Futebol Clube|Interporto]]  ||  2013 [[Campeonato Tocantinense]] champions
|}

{{note|1}}A. [[Sociedade Esportiva River Plate|River Plate]] was originally qualified as runners-up of the [[2013 Campeonato Sergipano]]. Because of their request to be absent for 2 two years of the Campeonato Sergiano due to financial problems, Lagarto earned their spot.

==Draw==
A draw by CBF held on January 10, 2014, set the matches for this round. The 81 qualified teams were divided in eight pots (A-H) with 10 teams each. They were divided based on the CBF Rankings and the matches were drawn from the respective confronts: A x E; B x F; C x G; D x H. The lower ranked teams of each match will host the first leg.<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://www.cbf.com.br/Not%C3%ADcias/Todas/2014/01/09/Veja%20os%20crit%C3%A9rios%20do%20sorteio%20desta%20sexta-feira |title = Confederação Brasileira de Futebol  |access-date=2014-01-12 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140110204811/http://www.cbf.com.br/Not%C3%ADcias/Todas/2014/01/09/Veja%20os%20crit%C3%A9rios%20do%20sorteio%20desta%20sexta-feira |archive-date=2014-01-10 |url-status=dead }}</ref> Before the Round of 16 there was another draw including the six teams that will play the [[2014 Copa Libertadores]].

==Preliminary round==
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]]'''|Acre|2–1|[[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]]|Espírito Santo|1–1|1–0}}
|}

===Preliminary match===
{{football box
|id = Real Noroeste v Rio Branco
|date=February 19, 2014
|time=20:30 [[UTC−3]]
|team1=[[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]] {{flagicon|Espírito Santo}}
|score=1–1
|report=[http://www.cbf.com.br/Competições/Copa%20do%20Brasil/Tabela/2014?fase=949 Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Acre}} [[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]]
|goals1=Robert {{goal|70}}
|goals2=Thiago {{goal|6}}
|stadium=[[Estádio José Olímpio da Rocha]], [[Águia Branca, Espírito Santo|Águia Branca]]
|attendance=450
|referee=Igor Junio Benevenuto ([[Federação Mineira de Futebol|Minas Gerais]])
}}
----
{{football box
|id = Rio Branco v Real Noroeste
|date=February 26, 2014
|time=21:30 [[UTC−3]]
|team1=[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]] {{flagicon|Acre}}
|score=1–0
|report=[http://www.cbf.com.br/Competições/Copa%20do%20Brasil/Tabela/2014?fase=949 Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]]
|goals1=[[Adriano Vieira Louzada|Adriano Louzada]] {{goal|89}}
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Arena da Floresta]], [[Rio Branco, Acre|Rio Branco]]
|attendance=1,479
|referee=Edmar Campos da Encarnacao ([[Federação Amazonense de Futebol|Amazonas]])
}}
''Rio Branco won 2–1 on aggregate.''

==First round==
{{main|2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#First round|l1=2014 Copa do Brasil First Round}}

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|1–0|[[Resende Futebol Clube|Resende]]|Rio de Janeiro|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Resende v Vasco da Gama|0–0]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Vasco da Gama v Resende|1–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze]]'''|Paraíba|3–2|[[Tombense Futebol Clube|Tombense]]|Minas Gerais|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Tombense v Treze|1–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Treze v Tombense|2–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]'''|São Paulo|4–1|[[Náutico Futebol Clube|Náutico]]|Roraima|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Náutico-RR v Ponte Preta|4–1]]|–}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]'''|Paraná|4–2|[[São Bernardo Futebol Clube|São Bernardo]]|São Paulo|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#São Bernardo v Paraná|1–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Paraná v São Bernardo|3–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]|Bahia|2–2 (3–5 [[Penalty shoot-out (association football)|p]])|'''[[J. Malucelli Futebol|J. Malucelli]]'''|Paraná|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#J. Malucelli v Vitória|1–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Vitória v J. Malucelli|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Joinville Esporte Clube|Joinville]]|Santa Catarina|2–3|'''[[Esporte Clube Novo Hamburgo|Novo Hamburgo]]'''|Rio Grande do Sul|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Novo Hamburgo v Joinville|0–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Joinville v Novo Hamburgo|2–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]'''|Goiás|3–2|[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo]]|Piauí|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Flamengo-PI v Atlético Goianiense|1–0]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Atlético Goianiense v Flamengo-PI|2–2]]}}

{{TwoLegResult|[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]|Distrito Federal|5–5 ([[Away goals rule|a]])|'''[[Princesa do Solimões Esporte Clube|Princesa do Solimões]]'''|Amazonas|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Princesa do Solimões v Brasiliense|1–3]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Brasiliense v Princesa do Solimões|4–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]|Santa Catarina|2–3|'''[[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina]]'''|Paraná|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Londrina v Criciúma|0–2]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil First Round#Criciúma v Londrina|2–1]]}}

{{TwoLegResult|[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]|Rio de Janeiro|5–5 ([[Away goals rule|a]])|'''[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]]'''|Rio Grande do Norte|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#América de Natal v Fluminense|3–0]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Fluminense v América de Natal|2–5]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]|Bahia|1–3|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''|São Paulo|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Corinthians v Bahia|0–3]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Bahia v Corinthians|1–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]|Pernambuco|3–4|'''[[Associação Atlética Santa Rita|Santa Rita]]'''|Alagoas|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Santa Rita v Santa Cruz|2–3]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Santa Cruz v Santa Rita|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]|São Paulo|3–4|'''[[Clube Atlético Bragantino|Bragantino]]'''|São Paulo|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Bragantino v São Paulo|2–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#São Paulo v Bragantino|1–3]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]|Pará|2–3|'''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]'''|Paraná|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Coritiba v Paysandu|0−2]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Paysandu v Coritiba|2−1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]'''|Ceará|5–2|[[SC Internacional|Internacional]]|Rio Grande do Sul|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Internacional v Ceará|2–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil Third Round#Ceará v Internacional|3–1]]}}
|}
*<div id="Note 1"></div>Note 1: Novo Hamburgo won on aggregate but was disqualified by the STJD after being punished for fielding an ineligible player.<ref>{{cite web|title=STJD elimina Novo Hamburgo e ABC segue na Copa do Brasil|url=http://globoesporte.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2014/08/stjd-elimina-novo-hamburgo-e-abc-fica-com-vaga-na-copa-do-brasil.html|publisher=globoesporte.com|access-date=13 August 2014|date=8 August 2014|language=pt}}</ref>

==Copa Sudamericana qualification==
The best seven teams eliminated before the Round of 16 with the best [[2013 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2013 Série A]] or [[2013 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|2013 Série B]] record (excluding those qualified for [[2014 Copa Libertadores]]) qualified for [[2014 Copa Sudamericana]].
{{col-begin|width=100%}}
{{col-2}}
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Pos !! Team !! Final status !! 2013 season
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|1 || [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]] || Eliminated <small>''(first round)''</small> || 5th ([[2013 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|Série A]])
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|2 || [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]] || Eliminated <small>''(first round)''</small> || 6th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|3 || [[Santos FC|Santos]] || ''Round of 16'' || 7th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|4 || [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 9th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|5 || [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] || ''Round of 16'' || 10th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|6 || [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] || ''Round of 16'' || 11th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|7 || [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] || Eliminated <small> ''(third round)''</small> || 12th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|8 || [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 13th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|9 || [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] || Eliminated <small>''(first round)''</small> || 14th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|10 || [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]] || Eliminated <small> ''(third round)''</small> || 15th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|11 || [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] || ''Round of 16'' || 1st ([[2013 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|Série B]])
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|12 || [[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]] || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 2nd (Série B)
|-bgcolor=#ccccff
|13 || [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]] <sup>1</sup> || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 3rd (Série B)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|14 || [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense]] || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 4th (Série B)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|15 || [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] || Eliminated <small>''(first round)''</small> || 17th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|16 || [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] || ''Round of 16'' || 18th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|17 || [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 19th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|18 || [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 20th (Série A)
|}
<small><sup>1</sup> [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]] is qualified as (Brazil 8) in the [[2014 Copa Sudamericana]], independently of qualifying position of the other seven teams.</small>
{{col-2}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=2|Key to colors on the table
|-
|bgcolor=#ccccff style="width: 20px;"|
|align=left|Qualified as the [[2014 Copa do Nordeste]] champion
|-
|bgcolor=#ccffcc style="width: 20px;"|
|align=left|Qualified
|-
|bgcolor=#ffcccc style="width: 20px;"|
|align=left|Not qualified
|}
{{col-end}}

==Knockout stages==
{{main|2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages}}

A draw by CBF was held on August 18 to set the matches for this round. The 16 qualified teams were divided in two pots. Teams from pot 1 were the ones who competed at the [[2014 Copa Libertadores]] plus the two highest [[CBF ranking|CBF ranked teams]] qualified via the Third Round. Pot 2 was composed of the other teams that qualified through the Third Round. Each pot was divided into 4 pairs according to the CBF ranking. That division ensured that each team within a pair will not face each other before the finals, as they will be placed in opposite sides of the bracket. There was a draw to decide the home team of the round of 16. The following stages had other draws to determine the order of the matches as the tournament advanced.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.cbf.com.br/noticias/campeonato-copa-brasil-masculino/sorteio-da-copa-do-brasil-sera-nesta-segunda-feira#.U_EV3EPOrzw|title=Sorteio da Copa do Brasil será nesta segunda-feira|publisher=cbf.com.br|date=17 August 2014|language=pt|access-date=17 August 2014}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://globoesporte.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2014/08/sorteio-define-os-mandos-de-campo-nas-oitavas-de-final-da-copa-do-brasil.html|title=Sorteio define os mandos de campo nas oitavas de final da Copa do Brasil|language=pt|date=August 18, 2014|publisher=globoesporte.globo.com}}</ref>

===Seeding===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!width="190"|Pot 1
!width="190"|Pot 2
|-
|
* {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] (1)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] (2)
* {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] (3)
* {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] (4)
* {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] (8)
* {{nowrap|{{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] (10)}}
* {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] (12)
* {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] (15)
|
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos FC|Santos]] (9)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] (11)
* {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] (14)
* {{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] (22)
* {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]] (29)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Clube Atlético Bragantino|Bragantino]] (34)
* {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]] (36)
* {{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Associação Atlética Santa Rita|Santa Rita]] (207)
|}

===Round of 16===

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''|São Paulo|2–0|[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]|Rio Grande do Sul|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Grêmio v Santos|2–0]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Santos v Grêmio|–]]<sup>[[#Note 2|1]]</sup>}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]|Ceará|5–5 ([[Away goals rule|a]])|'''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Botafogo v Ceará|2–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Ceará v Botafogo|3–4]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Associação Atlética Santa Rita|Santa Rita]]|Alagoas|1–7|'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''|Minas Gerais|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Cruzeiro v Santa Rita|0–5]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Santa Rita v Cruzeiro|1–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]'''|Rio Grande do Norte|3–2|[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]|Rio de Janeiro|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Vasco da Gama v ABC|1–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#ABC v Vasco da Gama|2–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|3–3 (3–2 [[Penalty shoot-out (association football)|p]])|[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]|Paraná|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Coritiba v Flamengo|0–3]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Flamengo v Coritiba|3–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|{{nowrap|[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]}}|Paraná|2–3|'''[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]]'''|Rio Grande do Norte|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#América de Natal v Atlético Paranaense|0–3]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Atlético Paranaense v América de Natal|2–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''|Minas Gerais|3–0|[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]|São Paulo|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Palmeiras v Atlético Mineiro|1–0]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Atlético Mineiro v Palmeiras|2–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''|São Paulo|3–2|[[Clube Atlético Bragantino|Bragantino]]|São Paulo|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Bragantino v Corinthians|0–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Corinthians v Bragantino|3–1]]}}
|}
*<div id="Note 2"></div>Note 1: Due to racist chants against [[Santos FC|Santos]]' player [[Aranha (footballer)|Aranha]] by [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] fans in the first leg, the STJD suspended the second leg scheduled for September 3 and removed Grêmio from the tournament, thus automatically qualifying Santos to the next round.<ref>{{cite web|title=Grêmio é excluído da Copa do Brasil após julgamento por injúrias raciais|url=http://globoesporte.globo.com/futebol/times/gremio/noticia/2014/09/gremio-e-excluido-da-copa-do-brasil-apos-julgamento-por-injurias-raciais.html|publisher=globoesporte.com|access-date=3 September 2014|date=3 September 2014|language=pt}}</ref>

===Quarterfinals===

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''|São Paulo|8–2|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]|Rio de Janeiro|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Botafogo v Santos|3–2]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Santos v Botafogo|5–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]|Rio Grande do Norte|3–3 ([[Away goals rule|a]])|'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''|Minas Gerais|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Cruzeiro v ABC|0–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#ABC v Cruzeiro|3–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|2–0|[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]]|Rio Grande do Norte|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#América de Natal v Flamengo|1–0]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Flamengo v América de Natal|1–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''|Minas Gerais|4–3|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]|São Paulo|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Corinthians v Atlético Mineiro|0–2]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Atlético Mineiro v Corinthians|4–1]]}}
|}

===Semifinals===

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Santos FC|Santos]]|São Paulo|3–4|'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''|Minas Gerais|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Winner Match 79 v Winner Match 80|0–1]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Winner Match 80 v Winner Match 79|3–3]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''|Minas Gerais|4–3|[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]|Rio de Janeiro|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Winner Match 81 v Winner Match 82|0–2]]|[[2014 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Winner Match 82 v Winner Match 81|4–1]]}}
|}

===Finals===
{{Football box
|id = Atlético Mineiro v Cruzeiro
|date=November 12, 2014
|time=22:00 [[UTC−2]]
|team1=[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}}
|score=2–0
|report=[http://globoesporte.globo.com/jogo/copa-do-brasil-2014/12-11-2014/atletico-mg-cruzeiro.html Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] 
|goals1=[[Luan Madson Gedeão de Paiva|Luan]] {{goal|8}}<br/> [[Jesús Dátolo|Dátolo]] {{goal|58}}
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Arena Independência|Estádio Independência]], [[Belo Horizonte]]
|attendance=18,578
|referee=Marcelo de Lima Henrique ([[Federação de Futebol do Estado do Rio de Janeiro|Rio de Janeiro]])
}}
----
{{Football box
|id = Cruzeiro v Atlético Mineiro
|date=November 26, 2014
|time=22:00 [[UTC−2]]
|team1=[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}}
|score=0–1

|goals1=

|stadium=[[Mineirão|Estádio Governador Magalhães Pinto (Mineirão)]], [[Belo Horizonte]]
|attendance=39,786
|referee=Luiz Flávio de Oliveira ([[Federação Paulista de Futebol|São Paulo]])
}}

|-
!2014 Copa do Brasil<br/>Champions
|-
|{{flagicon|Minas Gerais|size=100px}}
|-
|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''<br/>'''1st title'''
|}
